title: Magical Mission
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo goes undercover in London to solve the mystery of a roaring bronze lion — and ends up winning a magic contest! 🐭

q.en: Where does the strange mystery in this book take place?
q.zh: 这本书里的离奇谜案发生在哪里？

options.zh: 伦敦的特拉法尔加广场

explain.en: A news flash reports a mystery at London's Trafalgar Square, where a bronze lion statue has begun roaring insults at passersby.
explain.zh: 新闻快讯报道伦敦特拉法尔加广场出了一件怪事：一只青铜狮子雕像开始对路人咆哮辱骂。

q.en: What is actually making the insulting noises at the square?
q.zh: 广场上那些骂人的声音到底是从什么发出来的？

options.en: One of the four bronze lion statues by Nelson's Column
options.zh: 纳尔逊纪念柱旁四只青铜狮子雕像中的一只

options.en: A real live lion that escaped the zoo according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只从动物园逃出来的真狮子（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Four bronze lion statues guard Nelson's Column; one of them roars 'Get out of the way, Cheesebrain!' at visitors.
explain.zh: 纳尔逊纪念柱旁立着四只青铜狮子雕像，其中一只会对游客咆哮：“让开，奶酪脑！”

q.en: Who sends Geronimo the supersecret paper-airplane message?
q.zh: 是谁用纸飞机给杰罗尼摩送来那封绝密情报的？

options.en: Professor Brainymouse according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 布莱鼠教授（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: His friend Kornelius von Kickpaw, Secret Agent 00K
options.zh: 他的朋友科尼利厄斯·冯·基克波，代号特工00K

explain.en: The only mouse who sends Geronimo supersecret messages is his old friend Kornelius von Kickpaw, Secret Agent 00K, who needs help on a mission.
explain.zh: 唯一会给杰罗尼摩送绝密情报的是他的老朋友科尼利厄斯·冯·基克波，特工00K，他需要杰罗尼摩协助执行任务。

q.en: What contest does cousin Trap enter while they are in London?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普在伦敦期间参加了什么比赛？

options.en: The Ultimate Trick, to be crowned the world's greatest magician
options.zh: “终极魔法”大赛，争夺世界上最伟大魔术师的称号

options.en: A swimming race on the Thames according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 泰晤士河游泳赛（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Trap says he is going to London to compete in — and win — the Ultimate Trick, the world's greatest competition of illusionists.
explain.zh: 特拉普说自己去伦敦是为了参加并赢下“终极魔法”大赛——全球最伟大的幻术师竞赛。

q.en: What does the mystery crook demand be delivered by midnight?
q.zh: 那个神秘坏蛋要求午夜前交出什么？

options.en: The Crown Jewels, left in a big suitcase by the talking lion
options.zh: 皇冠珠宝，装在大箱子里放在会说话的狮子前

options.en: A suitcase full of cheese according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一箱子奶酪（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The threatening note says: hand over the Crown Jewels by midnight inside a big suitcase, left in front of the talking lion.
explain.zh: 那封恐吓信写道：午夜前把皇冠珠宝装进一只大箱子，放在会说话的狮子前面交出来。

q.en: How does Geronimo discover the lion is made to 'talk'?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是怎么发现狮子“说话”的窍门的？

options.en: A tiny speaker in the lion's mouth plus a hidden projector on a fountain dolphin
options.zh: 狮子嘴里藏了小喇叭，喷泉的海豚上藏了投影仪

options.en: A real mouse hiding inside the statue according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一只真老鼠藏在雕像里面（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A radio left by the Queen

explain.en: Geronimo finds a tiny speaker inside the lion's mouth and a tiny projector fastened to a dolphin in the fountain, projecting a moving-mouth image.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在狮子嘴里找到一只小喇叭，又在喷泉的海豚身上发现一台投影仪，正把会动的嘴部影像投射到雕像上。

q.en: Who is the mysterious crook behind the talking lion?
q.zh: 会说话的狮子背后的神秘坏蛋是谁？

options.en: Mystery Mouse, the magician in the cheddar-colored cape
options.zh: “神秘鼠”，穿切达色斗篷的魔术师

options.en: Professor Ratting according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 拉廷教授（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The crook caught at the suitcase is Mystery Mouse — he is scratching and stinky from the itching powder and skunk stink Geronimo set as traps.
explain.zh: 在箱子旁被抓的坏蛋就是“神秘鼠”——他因为杰罗尼摩下的痒粉和臭鼬臭液，正又抓又臭。

q.en: What does Geronimo paint on the suitcase handle to catch the crook?
q.zh: 为了抓坏蛋，杰罗尼摩在箱子把手上涂了什么？

options.en: Red nail polish according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 红色指甲油（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo paints the suitcase handle with a special glow paint (used in Trap's act) so he can see and identify whoever grabs it.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在箱子把手上涂了特殊的夜光漆（特拉普表演用的道具），好看清并认出谁去抓它。

q.en: Which family members fly to London to help with the Big Ben trick?
q.zh: 哪些家人飞到伦敦来帮忙完成“让大本钟消失”的魔术？

options.zh: 蒂奥、本杰明和巴格西·瓦格西

options.en: Professor Brainymouse and Hercule according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 布莱鼠教授和赫库勒（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea takes the next flight out and arrives with Benjamin and his friend Bugsy Wugsy to set up the stage for the Big Ben act.
explain.zh: 蒂奥立刻搭下一班飞机赶来，还带着本杰明和他的朋友巴格西·瓦格西，一起搭好了大本钟表演的舞台。

q.en: How does Geronimo make Big Ben 'disappear' during the show?
q.zh: 演出中杰罗尼摩是如何让大本钟“消失”的？

options.en: Thea flies it away in a plane
options.zh: 蒂奥用飞机把它吊走了

options.en: He uses real magic to shrink the tower according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他用真魔法把钟楼缩小了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He pulls a rope three times so curtains hide it behind a sky-colored screen
options.zh: 他拉了三次绳子，让幕布把它遮在仿天空色的屏风后

explain.en: Thea tells Geronimo to just pull the rope three times; the curtains open and close, and on the third pull a screen hides Big Ben, framing empty sky.
explain.zh: 蒂奥让杰罗尼摩只管拉三次绳子，幕布随之开合；第三次拉开时，一道屏风遮住大本钟，框出一片空旷蓝天，仿佛钟楼消失了。
